title: Chapter 3
text: For my best friend, partner, and lover; you are my purpose . Special thanks to Colleen Vanderlinden for taking on this book in our hour of need, to Isis Sousa for always creating such beautiful art for our covers, and to Elaine Robson for taking the time to answer the many questions we had about medical care . And, to the late Lora Gasway — thank you. We can’t deny our disappointment when you recommended we set this book aside, but your advice allowed us to grow as writers and tell this story the way it was meant to be told. Though our time with you was short, your influence on our writing will continue throughout our lives .
